task: Clip/crop a raster (DEM/TIF) to a polygon boundary from KML

output.description: Clipped GeoTIFF containing only the area inside the polygon

steps.name: parse_polygon
steps.description: Read KML, extract polygon geometry as GeoJSON

steps.name: clip_raster
steps.description: Use rasterio.mask to clip the raster to the polygon. Handle CRS mismatch by reprojecting polygon if needed.
